name: No-Name-Yet Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes.
2. Mix together 1/2 cup chopped onion, 1/2 teaspoon celery seed, 4 hard-boiled eggs, and 2 tablespoons juice from drained tomatoes.
3. Add 2 tablespoons dill relish to the mixture.
4. If needed, add crushed saltine crackers to thicken the salad.
5. To make the sauce:
a. Beat together mayonnaise and mustard thoroughly.
b. Gradually add olive oil while beating continuously.
c. Incorporate all remaining ingredients into the dressing by stirring until well combined.
6. Add the prepared sauce to the salad and mix gently.
